info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Addons Resource Provider
info.description: The service for managing third party addons.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Addons Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available Addons RP operations.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Addons Supportproviders Providername Supportplantypes Plantypename

variable.description: (Required) Subscription credentials that uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The support plan type. For now the only valid type is "canonical".

request.description: Returns whether or not the canonical support plan of type {type} is enabled for the subscription.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Addons Supportproviders Providername Supportplantypes Plantypename

variable.description: (Required) Subscription credentials that uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The support plan type. For now the only valid type is "canonical".

request.description: Creates or updates the Canonical support plan of type {type} for the subscription.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Addons Supportproviders Providername Supportplantypes Plantypename

variable.description: (Required) Subscription credentials that uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The support plan type. For now the only valid type is "canonical".

request.description: Cancels the Canonical support plan of type {type} for the subscription.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Addons Supportproviders Canonical Listsupportplaninfo

variable.description: (Required) Subscription credentials that uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

request.description: Returns the canonical support plan information for all types for the subscription.
